options.name: --tfm
options.description: The target framework moniker to analyze

options.name: --exclude
options.description: One or more packages to exclude

options.name: --skip
options.description: One or more project references to exclude

options.name: --strict
options.description:
Returns exit code 0 only if no conflicts were
found

options.name: --outputsimple
options.description: Return results in simple ANSI mode

options.name: --applycan
options.description: Remove the references from 'Can Remove' subset

options.name: --applymay
options.description:
Remove the references from 'Might Remove' subset
the projects. (Saves the time)

options.name: --noBuild
options.description:
Analyze via solution file without building of all
the projects. (Saves the time)

options.name: --packageprops
options.description:
Clear Packages.props from the package references
that are not used in any project
